zh.Lallaing, 59327, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calai: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德拉萊艾
zh.La Laine, Haute-Saône, Franche-Comté, Fr: 法國福朗-可特艾豪-薩o拉 萊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing於大約1306年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德拉萊艾時，他的父親Simon III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing56歲，母親Mahaut d'Aspremont, Heiress of Quiévrain25歲。他於1330年與Isabeau Marie de Montigny結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1369年享年65歲，埋葬在法國福朗-可特艾豪-薩o拉 萊。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing于大约1306年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德拉萊艾时，他的父亲Simon III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing56岁，母亲Mahaut d'Aspremont, Heiress of Quiévrain25岁。他于1330年与Isabeau Marie de Montigny结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1369年享年65岁，埋葬在法国福朗-可特艾豪-薩o拉 萊。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Nicolas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nicolao
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing was born about 1306, in Lallaing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Simon III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing, was 56 and his mother, Mahaut d'Aspremont, Heiress of Quiévrain, was 25. He married Isabeau Marie de Montigny in 1330. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1369, at the age of 65, and was buried in La Laine, Haute-Saône, Franche-Comté, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing est né environ 1306, à Lallaing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Simon III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Mahaut d'Aspremont, Heiress of Quiévrain, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Isabeau Marie de Montigny en 1330. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1369, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à La Laine, Haute-Saône, Franche-Comté, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing um 1306 in Lallaing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing 56 und seine Mutter Mahaut d'Aspremont, Heiress of Quiévrain 25. Er hat 1330 Isabeau Marie de Montigny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1369 im Alter von 65 Jahren und wurde in La Laine, Haute-Saône, Franche-Comté, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing è nato il circa 1306 nel Lallaing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Simon III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Mahaut d'Aspremont, Heiress of Quiévrain, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Isabeau Marie de Montigny nel 1330. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1369, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a La Laine, Haute-Saône, Franche-Comté, Francia.

ja.Lallaing, 59327, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calai: フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードラレイング
ja.La Laine, Haute-Saône, Franche-Comté, Fr: フランスフランチェ-コムトeハウテ-サoンラ レアイン
ja.lifeSummary: Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaingが約1306年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードラレイングで生まれた時，父Simon III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaingは56歳，母Mahaut d'Aspremont, Heiress of Quiévrainは25歳であった。1330年にIsabeau Marie de Montignyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1369年に65歳で死去し，フランスフランチェ-コムトeハウテ-サoンラ レアインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing(이)가 대략 1306년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 라레이그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Mahaut d'Aspremont, Heiress of Quiévrain(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1330년 Isabeau Marie de Montigny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1369년 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 프랭체-코트e 하테-사o니 라 레이인에 묻혔다.

mg.um 1306–ABT 1369: tany ho any amin'ny 1306–tany ho any amin'ny 1369

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing nasceu aproximadamente 1306, em Lallaing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Simon III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Mahaut d'Aspremont, Heiress of Quiévrain, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabeau Marie de Montigny em 1330. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1369, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em La Laine, Haute-Saône, Franche-Comté, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing родился около 1306 г. в местности лаллеинг, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Simon III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Mahaut d'Aspremont, Heiress of Quiévrain, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabeau Marie de Montigny в 1330 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1369 г. в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности ла леин, хауте-саoн, фрэнче-комтe, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing nació aproximadamente 1306, en Lallaing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Simon III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Mahaut d'Aspremont, Heiress of Quiévrain, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Isabeau Marie de Montigny en 1330. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1369, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en La Laine, Haute-Saône, Franche-Comté, Francia.
